resource-loading-css-coverage-measuremen.description: Verify Null-guard header is present after fix
Verify Null-guarded header is present after fix
Verify fix does not introduce new console errors
Verify that CSS resources are classified by Content-Type header text/css and not misclassified as fonts.
setup_steps: Enable network logging via CDP before page navigation
Verify response header Content-Type is text/css or text/css; charset=utf-8
Confirm transferSize and encodedBodySize are populated from Performance API
Calculate compression ratio (encodedBodySize / transferSize) and verify it is between 1.5 and 7.0

resource-loading-css-coverage-measuremen.description: Verify that font resources (woff2, woff, ttf, otf) are excluded from CSS byte totals and classified separately.
setup_steps: Enable network logging via CDP before page navigation
Verify response header Content-Type is one of: font/woff2, font/woff, font/ttf, font/otf, application/font-woff2
Confirm font bytes are recorded in fontTransferBytes and fontTotalBytes, NOT in cssTransferBytes or cssTotalBytes
Assert that font_transfer_bytes > 0 and font_total_bytes > 0 in measurement_health output

resource-loading-css-coverage-measuremen.description: Verify that document.styleSheets.length matches the count of CSS resources in the network log (stylesheet count parity check).
setup_steps: Navigate to page with waitUntil: 'load'
Wait 500ms for post-load idle period (POST_LOAD_IDLE_WAIT_MS)
Poll document.styleSheets.length twice at 100ms intervals to confirm stability
Compare browserStylesheetCount from page.evaluate() against cssFileCount from network log
Assert that stylesheet_count_parity check in measurement_health.validation_checks passes

resource-loading-css-coverage-measuremen.description: Verify that CSS coverage snapshot is taken only after all timing conditions are met and status is recorded as valid or timeout, never silently as 0% unused.
setup_steps: Start CSS coverage via page.coverage.startCSSCoverage() before navigation
Navigate to page with waitUntil: 'load'
Confirm 'load' event has fired
Wait for POST_LOAD_IDLE_WAIT_MS (500ms) network idle window
Poll document.styleSheets.length for STYLESHEET_STABILITY_REQUIRED_POLLS (2) consecutive stable readings at STYLESHEET_STABILITY_POLL_MS (100ms) intervals
Assert that snapshot_timing_ms in measurement_health is recorded and > 0
Assert that status field is one of: valid, measurement_suspect, classification_error, timeout, cdp_error
Assert that if status is timeout, css_unused_pct is null (not 0)

resource-loading-css-coverage-measuremen.description: Verify that zero-unused plausibility check flags implausible 0% unused measurements on stylesheets larger than 10KB.
setup_steps: Collect CSS coverage via collectCssCoverage()
Check if css_unused_pct === 0 AND css_total_bytes > 10240 (ZERO_UNUSED_SUSPECT_THRESHOLD_BYTES)
Assert that measurement_health.zero_unused_flagged is true when both conditions are met
Assert that measurement_health.validation_checks includes check with name 'zero_unused_plausibility' and passed: false
Assert that status is set to measurement_suspect when this check fails

resource-loading-css-coverage-measuremen.description: Verify that compression ratio sanity check detects misclassified bytes and flags ratios outside 1.5–7.0 range.
setup_steps: Collect network log with Content-Type classification
Calculate compression_ratio = cssTotalBytes / cssTransferBytes
Assert that measurement_health.compression_ratio is recorded
Assert that measurement_health.validation_checks includes check with name 'compression_ratio_sanity'
If compression_ratio > 7.0, assert that check.passed is false and status includes classification_error
If compression_ratio < 1.5, assert that check.passed is false and status includes classification_error
If 1.5 <= compression_ratio <= 7.0, assert that check.passed is true

all_tests.description: Verify that font resources (woff2, woff, ttf, otf) are excluded from CSS byte totals and classified separately.
setup_steps: Enable network logging via CDP before page navigation
Verify response header Content-Type is one of: font/woff2, font/woff, font/ttf, font/otf, application/font-woff2
Confirm font bytes are recorded in fontTransferBytes and fontTotalBytes, NOT in cssTransferBytes or cssTotalBytes
Assert that font_transfer_bytes > 0 and font_total_bytes > 0 in measurement_health output

all_tests.description: Verify that document.styleSheets.length matches the count of CSS resources in the network log (stylesheet count parity check).
setup_steps: Navigate to page with waitUntil: 'load'
Wait 500ms for post-load idle period (POST_LOAD_IDLE_WAIT_MS)
Poll document.styleSheets.length twice at 100ms intervals to confirm stability
Compare browserStylesheetCount from page.evaluate() against cssFileCount from network log
Assert that stylesheet_count_parity check in measurement_health.validation_checks passes

all_tests.description: Verify that CSS coverage snapshot is taken only after all timing conditions are met and status is recorded as valid or timeout, never silently as 0% unused.
setup_steps: Start CSS coverage via page.coverage.startCSSCoverage() before navigation
Navigate to page with waitUntil: 'load'
Confirm 'load' event has fired
Wait for POST_LOAD_IDLE_WAIT_MS (500ms) network idle window
Poll document.styleSheets.length for STYLESHEET_STABILITY_REQUIRED_POLLS (2) consecutive stable readings at STYLESHEET_STABILITY_POLL_MS (100ms) intervals
Assert that snapshot_timing_ms in measurement_health is recorded and > 0
Assert that status field is one of: valid, measurement_suspect, classification_error, timeout, cdp_error
Assert that if status is timeout, css_unused_pct is null (not 0)

all_tests.description: Verify that zero-unused plausibility check flags implausible 0% unused measurements on stylesheets larger than 10KB.
setup_steps: Collect CSS coverage via collectCssCoverage()
Check if css_unused_pct === 0 AND css_total_bytes > 10240 (ZERO_UNUSED_SUSPECT_THRESHOLD_BYTES)
Assert that measurement_health.zero_unused_flagged is true when both conditions are met
Assert that measurement_health.validation_checks includes check with name 'zero_unused_plausibility' and passed: false
Assert that status is set to measurement_suspect when this check fails

all_tests.description: Verify that compression ratio sanity check detects misclassified bytes and flags ratios outside 1.5–7.0 range.
setup_steps: Collect network log with Content-Type classification
Calculate compression_ratio = cssTotalBytes / cssTransferBytes
Assert that measurement_health.compression_ratio is recorded
Assert that measurement_health.validation_checks includes check with name 'compression_ratio_sanity'
If compression_ratio > 7.0, assert that check.passed is false and status includes classification_error
If compression_ratio < 1.5, assert that check.passed is false and status includes classification_error
If 1.5 <= compression_ratio <= 7.0, assert that check.passed is true
